findings.title: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
findings.remediation: Restreindre l'ingress SSH à un CIDR de confiance, jamais 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: Ensure no root account access key exists
findings.remediation: Supprimer toute access key associée au compte root ; n'utiliser le root qu'exceptionnellement avec MFA.

findings.title: Security group rule allows ingress from public internet on port 22
findings.remediation: Restreindre cidr_blocks à une plage privée.

findings.title: Ensure the S3 bucket does not allow READ permissions to everyone
findings.remediation: Retirer l'ACL public-read ; gérer l'accès via des policies restreintes.

findings.title: Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLs enabled
findings.remediation: Activer block_public_acls = true sur le public access block du bucket.

findings.title: Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled
findings.remediation: Imposer IMDSv2 : metadata_options { http_tokens = "required" }.

findings.title: Ensure IAM password policy requires minimum length of 14 or greater
findings.remediation: Porter minimum_password_length à 14 dans la politique de mot de passe du compte.

findings.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for the root account
findings.remediation: Activer un dispositif MFA matériel ou virtuel sur le compte root.

findings.title: Instance does not require IMDS access to require a token
findings.remediation: Définir http_tokens = required dans metadata_options.

findings.title: S3 Access block should block public ACL
findings.remediation: Mettre block_public_acls à true.

findings.title: Ensure that S3 buckets are encrypted with KMS by default
findings.remediation: Ajouter aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration avec une CMK KMS.

findings.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all Regions
findings.remediation: Mettre is_multi_region_trail = true.

findings.title: Ensure rotation for customer created CMKs is enabled
findings.remediation: Activer enable_key_rotation = true sur la CMK.

findings.title: Ensure all data stored in the Launch configuration EBS is securely encrypted
findings.remediation: Chiffrer le volume racine : root_block_device { encrypted = true }.

findings.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
findings.remediation: Configurer un trail multi-régions couvrant les events de management et les services globaux.

findings.title: Ensure EBS volume encryption is enabled by default
findings.remediation: Activer le chiffrement EBS par défaut au niveau du compte/région.

findings.title: Root block device is not encrypted
findings.remediation: Mettre encrypted = true sur root_block_device.

findings.title: S3 encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
findings.remediation: Configurer le chiffrement SSE-KMS avec une CMK.

findings.title: Ensure CloudTrail log file validation is enabled
findings.remediation: Mettre enable_log_file_validation = true.

findings.title: Ensure access keys are rotated every 90 days or less
findings.remediation: Faire tourner ou désactiver toute access key de plus de 90 jours.
